description_long: This object is a modern shotgun featuring a long, metallic barrel with a matte silver finish and a set of iron sights mounted on top. The stock is robust and ergonomically shaped, made from a brown synthetic or wooden material with a black rubberized butt pad for recoil absorption. The receiver area is compact and streamlined, with a visible trigger and a rounded trigger guard. The fore-end is minimal, and the overall design is sleek, suggesting a focus on utility and durability. The shotgun lacks visible external magazines or pump mechanisms, indicating a break-action or single-shot configuration. The combination of materials and finishes gives it a professional, utilitarian appearance suitable for urban or sporting use.
description: A sleek, modern shotgun with a silver barrel, brown ergonomic stock, and black butt pad, featuring a compact receiver and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the silver barrel, brown stock, black butt pad, and the compact receiver with iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights, with minimal stock visibility.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the same barrel, stock, and receiver details from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the black butt pad and the back of the stock, with the barrel extending away and the trigger guard barely visible.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement or finger grooves
